dress_code: Smart Casual (collared shirts and slacks for men, dresses or pantsuits for women; no shorts, t-shirts, or swimwear)
signature_dishes: Bread Service with nine different salts
what_makes_it_unique: It offers an intimate, upscale dining experience with a focus on seasonal, farm-to-table ingredients. The menu often features locally sourced produce and premium cuts of meat and seafood.
